title: Tome V Act 8: The ZK Circuit

story.text:
# 📖 Tome V Act 8: The ZK Circuit
**act** · shared · narrative

Aletheia binds the witness; the truth is shown without being told. (Anchor follows the keeper: V25 → V38 with the v1.8.0 complement-pair reseat.)
> *The witness is bound. The artifact carries its proof. The truth is shown without being told.*
